title: cordia globosa var. humilis
intro: Cordia globosa var. humilis, also known as the dwarf Cordia, is a compact shrub or small tree native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cordia globosa var. humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and other health concerns.
